app.name: Executo
app.mailpit_hint: Development email is available in Mailpit

dashboard.title: Manage customers, cases, and payments in one workflow
dashboard.subtitle: This initial scaffold prepares the authentication, district, and debt modules for the next implementation phase.
dashboard.focus_title: One workspace for day-to-day district operations
dashboard.focus_copy: Continue with customers, debts, and payments inside one calm operational flow. Once district data is connected, this area will show your active context and key metrics.
dashboard.environment_copy: Access is organized through authentication, roles, and security headers so the workspace is suitable for sensitive operational data.
dashboard.today_copy: The landing screen is designed as a central starting point for customer, case, and payment flows that will expand from here.
dashboard.access_copy: New accounts start without district membership. Access to a district is then granted by an app admin or district admin.

hero.title: Access the customer and debt workspace with a calmer, more deliberate flow.
hero.body: Sign in, register, or restore access using the same operational shell used for district administration. New accounts stay unattached until an app admin or district admin assigns access.

cards.secure_body: New accounts require email verification before they can sign in.
cards.locale_body: Latvian stays the default, with English available for users who need it.
cards.access_body: After registration, access is granted by app admins or district admins.

hero.note_body: Self-registration creates a user account only. District membership is added later by an authorized administrator.

shared.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_too_short: The password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.link_invalid: The link is incomplete or invalid.

register.title: Create your account
register.body: Register your personal user account. A district admin or app admin can attach it to a district later.
register.verify_body: Confirm your address to activate sign-in access for the new account.
register.success: Registration received. Check your email for the verification link.
register.verification_resent: A new verification email has been sent if the account exists and is still unverified.
register.verification_link_ready: Your verification link is ready. Continue to confirm your email.
register.verification_link_missing: The verification link is incomplete or missing.
register.verified: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
register.verification_failed: The verification link is invalid or expired.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.body: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgot.success: If that account exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please follow the instructions in the email.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.token_ready: Enter a new password to continue.
reset.success: Your password has been updated successfully.
